blocklist_terms: title and card do not match
insights: 100% of rejections (6/6) had structural mismatches: facsimile signatures, wrong card numbers, wrong parallels, or misleading titles vs. card specs.
Confirmations feature legitimate vintage/modern branded cards (Topps, Authentic Images) with significant underpricing (81–82% delta vs. market).
Facsimile signature cards appear in 2/6 rejections; zero confirmations mention facsimile or printed signatures.
Rejected titles often contain excessive emojis, all-caps marketing, or generic grouping language ('Group of noted'); confirmed titles use standard set/year/card# format.
Card number/set mismatches account for 3/6 rejections; confirmed listings have accurate spec alignment.
Both confirmations are Ichiro Suzuki autographs priced under $17 vs. market ~$90; rejected Ichiro cards include false sets (Panini 2024, Leaf 2004 MSIG).
